headline: Is It Time To Reassess CF Industries Holdings (CF) After Its Strong Year To Date Run?
summary: For those wondering whether CF Industries Holdings at around US$121.70 is priced for further upside or already reflects the current story, this article focuses squarely on what the current share price might be implying about value. The stock has eased slightly in the last week, declining 2.8%, and is also down 0.6% over the past month, yet it still shows returns of 51.9% year to date and 39.8% over the last year, with very large gains over the past 3 and 5 years. Recent coverage has centered...
